company_info: Vikara.AI is a cutting-edge startup specializing in autonomous multi-agent systems and voice AI infrastructure.
roles_available: We are currently hiring for three open roles: AI Agent Development Intern, Full Stack Developer, and Product Designer.
internship_details: All internships at Vikara are 3-month remote positions. We look for proactive builders who love shipping code fast.
interview_process: The interview process begins with this AI screening call to assess baseline fit, followed by a technical assessment, and a final founder interview.
tech_stack: Our core engineering tech stack includes Python, React, Next.js, FastAPI, Llama models via Groq, and MongoDB.
